systems.system_notes: Reverse shoulder arthroplasty platform designed for cuff-deficient shoulders and complex reconstruction.

trays.tray_notes: Official shoulder materials support dedicated DELTA XTEND reverse shoulder instrumentation and technique resources.

components.component_notes: Official product materials describe the humeral stem family within the reverse shoulder construct.
Official product materials describe the glenoid baseplate fixation platform.
Official product materials describe the reverse glenosphere options within the system.
Official product materials describe the polyethylene humeral bearing component used in the reverse construct.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public DELTA XTEND pages define the reverse shoulder construct but do not expose a public implant code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure, IFU, or operative-technique pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
